ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign creator */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company organizing the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Goal amount for the campaign */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Total amount pledged by backers */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campaign is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the campaign */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ends */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Category of the campaign */,
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Subcategory of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES campaign_creators ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES categories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_creators" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the campaign creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the campaign creator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the campaign creator's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign creator's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign creator's account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the campaign creator (e.g., admin, creator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being backed */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the backer made the pledge */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward chosen by the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category/subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign offering the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_amount" INTEGER /* Minimum pledge amount required for the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the update belongs to */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* ID of the update the comment belongs to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the payment */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the notification belongs to */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (backer or campaign creator) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, comment, payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES campaign_creators ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("cf_id")
)
